code:
data Bucket
  mut tokens: Int
end

fn allow(_ b: Bucket) -> Bool
  mut bb = b
  if bb.tokens >= 1
    bb.tokens = bb.tokens - 1
    true
  else
    false
  end
end

fn label(_ ok: Bool) -> String
  if ok
    "ALLOW"
  else
    "DENY"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let bucket = Bucket(tokens: 3)
  println(label(allow(bucket)))
  println(label(allow(bucket)))
  println(label(allow(bucket)))
  println(label(allow(bucket)))
  println(label(allow(bucket)))
end
